parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to multiple contradictory claims. He is identified as the Doppelganger (Copycat) who copied a center card, yet he claimed to be the Seer and later claimed to be the Robber who robbed Paul. Since only one role can be held, and Tyler also claimed Seer with specific information about the center, James's shifting claims strongly suggest he is bluffing as a Werewolf.

validation.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to multiple contradictory claims. He is identified as the Doppelganger (Copycat) who copied a center card, yet he claimed to be the Seer and later claimed to be the Robber who robbed Paul. Since only one role can be held, and Tyler also claimed Seer with specific information about the center, James's shifting claims strongly suggest he is bluffing as a Werewolf.
